values: Operational copy for sales/support. Hub API/Postgres remains the source of truth. Never store claim secrets, MQTT tokens, JWTs, or passwords here.
Existing test device. Preserve its current deviceId and MQTT routing.
Flash firmware and read Wi-Fi station MAC
Request next serial, create unowned device, print QR
Claim secret is random and single-use
No tokens, passwords, or claim secrets in Sheet
Scan QR and sign in with Google
Validate claim atomically and attach owner
Poll provisioning channel and store device token in NVS
Token returned only to the device
